summary: Phase 1 Plan Selection System - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (6 endpoints) pass 100%. Frontend UI shows Plan Selection modal with correct pricing ($10.99 founders, $16.99 public, 35% OFF), PREMIUM badge in profile, 2× gem multiplier text, and Settings 'Your Plan' card with Manage button.
critical_code_review_comments: Plan Selection component correctly fetches pricing from /api/pricing endpoint
Discount calculation (35%) is computed dynamically from founders_price and public_price
User plan state is properly synced between frontend and backend
Gem multiplier (1× for basic, 2× for premium) correctly applied in trip completion
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with default user 123456
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plan Selection system fully tested. User can upgrade from Settings > Your Plan > Manage. Premium shows 35% discount ($10.99 vs $16.99). Profile shows PREMIUM badge and 2× gem multiplier text.

PUT /api/admin/pricing.notes: Admin can update founders_price, public_price, is_founders_active

POST /api/user/plan.notes: User can select 'basic' or 'premium' plan. Invalid plans rejected.

POST /api/trips/complete.notes: Basic plan: 5 gems (1×), Premium plan: 10 gems (2×)

features: BASIC plan card: $0/mo with features list

profile_premium_badge.notes: Profile header shows '⚡ PREMIUM' badge next to Level

gem_multiplier_text.notes: Profile shows '💎 2× gem multiplier active' below user name

features: Your Plan card visible in Settings tab
Manage button opens Plan Selection modal

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. No database connected. User data, pricing config, plans, cars, badges, offers all stored in memory.
